description: API2Cart provides a unified API for connecting SaaS products to many eCommerce platforms and marketplaces through one integration layer. It is used to work with store, product, order, customer, category, and webhook data across supported carts.
summary: API2Cart exposes a unified REST API for eCommerce integrations and an OAuth-protected MCP-related endpoint surface under `/wp-json/mcp/v1/oauth`; no public GraphQL API or CLI was found.
